channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: EFCC arrests former Skye Bank chairman Tunde Ayeni over alleged fund misappropriation
item.description: The Economic and Financial Crimes Commission (EFCC) don arrest Tunde Ayeni, the former chairman of the now-defunct Skye Bank, for allegedly mismanaging and laundering large sums of money. According to...

item.title: Thurston reacts strongly to Staggs’ remark about playing through injury
item.description: A moment involving Brisbane Broncos centre Kotoni Staggs and rugby league great Johnathan Thurston has sparked attention after a remark about injury management drew a dramatic on-air reaction. Staggs,...

item.title: Newfoundland ends U.K. soccer sponsorship amid debate over public spending and marketing strategy
item.description: The Government of Newfoundland and Labrador has decided to end its $171,000 sponsorship deal with Barrow AFC, a fourth-tier English soccer club, after criticism over its value and effectiveness. The a...

item.title: Reflecting on Anzac Day: Its Relevance in Contemporary Australia
item.description: Anzac Day has transformed significantly since the first commemorations following the Gallipoli landings in 1915. Originally marked by sombre reflection, many veterans found participation painful and o...

item.title: Entrepreneurship programmes help South African youth build practical skills and create opportunities
item.description: In South Africa, many young people struggle to turn their ideas into real opportunities due to a lack of practical skills and guidance. KOA Academy is working to address this gap by equipping pupils w...

item.title: Debate Over J&K Statehood Intensifies Between BJP and NC Leaders
item.description: In Srinagar, political tensions over the restoration of Jammu and Kashmir’s statehood have escalated. BJP leader and J&K Assembly opposition leader Sushil Sharma referred to NC leader Omar Abdullah as...

item.title: Activist Charged with Extortion Attempt Against KWS Director
item.description: A Nairobi court has charged activist Francis Awino Onyango with attempting to extort KSh 1.7 million from the Kenya Wildlife Service (KWS) Director General, Erastus Kanga. The allegations claim that O...

item.title: Spontaneous Combustion Causes Volcanic-Like Fires Along California Coast
item.description: In Santa Barbara, what locals call the 'Hope Ranch Volcano' is not a true volcano, despite appearances. Geologists explain that the fires and smoke are caused by spontaneous combustion resulting from ...

item.title: DOJ says no confirmed information yet on Zaldy Co’s location abroad
item.description: The Department of Justice (DOJ) in the Philippines has clarified that authorities still do not have confirmed or reliable information regarding the whereabouts of businessman Zaldy Co, amid circulatin...

item.title: FIFA resale site lists World Cup final tickets at various high prices, including over US$2 million for premium seats
item.description: FIFA’s official resale platform has listed four tickets for the 2026 World Cup final at MetLife Stadium, East Rutherford, New Jersey, each priced just under US$2.3 million. These seats are located in ...

item.title: Ruto’s remarks on English spark online exchange between Kenyans and Nigerians
item.description: President William Ruto has sparked strong reactions online after making comments about Nigerians’ English during his official visit to Italy. While addressing Kenyans living in Rome, Ruto praised Keny...

item.title: Students asked to remove sacred thread during exam sparks debate in Bengaluru
item.description: In Bengaluru, a controversy erupted after some students were reportedly asked to remove their sacred threads before entering the examination hall. The incident, which occurred at a local educational i...

item.title: Tokenised Gold: A New Step in Integrating Real-World Assets into Digital Finance
item.description: Tokenised gold is becoming a prominent model for integrating real-world assets into blockchain technology. In just one year, the tokenised gold market saw massive growth, from $1.9 billion in 2025 to ...

item.title: Hadi Sirika Declares Candidacy for Katsina North Senatorial Seat
item.description: Former Aviation Minister, Hadi Sirika, don officially announce say e wan contest for Katsina North Senatorial District. E make this announcement for APC State Secretariat on Friday, wey supporters ple...

item.title: PCSO Lotto Results for April 24, 2026 Released
item.description: Inilathala ng ABS-CBN News ang opisyal na lotto results para sa Abril 24, 2026, mula sa Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO). Ang naturang ulat ay bahagi ng regular na pagbibigay ng impormasyo...

item.title: Delhi Census 2027 fieldwork to include weekend mornings for faster completion
item.description: The Census 2027 fieldwork in Delhi is being accelerated as government school teachers, who are serving as enumerators, have been instructed to conduct door-to-door surveys not only after school hours ...

item.title: Five individuals formally charged in connection with the sexual assault of a teenage girl in Kent
item.description: Authorities in Kent have charged five people in connection with the alleged sexual assault of a teenage girl. The charges come after an investigation into an incident that has sparked serious concern ...

item.title: Jewish student files $1.3M lawsuit against Toronto Metropolitan University alleging antisemitic harassment
item.description: A Jewish student has launched a $1.3 million lawsuit against Toronto Metropolitan University (TMU), alleging that the institution failed to prevent a hostile and discriminatory learning environment fo...

item.title: Uniqlo's Latest Collaboration and a Rachel Gilbert Gown for Winter
item.description: This week’s fashion update features a mix of home decor and luxurious eveningwear, with a special focus on a new collaboration from Uniqlo. The brand has teamed up with designers to create an exciting...

item.title: Iranian Foreign Minister visits Islamabad as Pakistan prepares for possible US-Iran talks
item.description: An Iranian delegation led by Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi has arrived in Islamabad for high-level engagements with Pakistan’s leadership, as diplomatic activity intensifies around possible renewed ...
